dependencies: Does not produce crude oil and must purchase all feedstocks
Reliance on third-party transportation of crude oil, feedstocks, NGL, refined petroleum and renewable fuels products
Dependence on OPEC and non-OPEC production levels impacting crude oil prices
Reliance on natural gas and electricity availability for operations
Dependence on renewable feedstocks availability (used cooking oil, vegetable oils, waste oils)
risks: Interruptions of supply and offtake due to reliance on third-party transportation
Weather events, natural disasters, accidents, governmental regulations, public health crises, armed hostilities, or third-party actions including protests could disrupt transportation
Supply chain disruptions may delay projects or increase costs
Competition for renewable fuels feedstocks may increase costs or reduce availability
Capacity constraints in pipelines, storage and fractionation facilities
Changes in cost or availability of adequate and reliable transportation

regulatory_risks: Climate change legislation or regulation could result in increased operating costs and reduce demand for refined petroleum products
EPA Renewable Fuel Standard (RFS) compliance - requirement to blend renewable fuels into motor fuels or purchase RINs
California Senate Bill No. 2 (SBx 1-2) - authorizes establishment of maximum gross gasoline refining margin and financial penalties
California cap and trade program under Assembly Bill 398 and Senate Bill 32
California Air Resources Board (CARB) regulations - ban on new internal combustion engine vehicle sales by 2035
California Low Carbon Fuel Standard and other state low carbon fuel standards
EU Emissions Trading Scheme (EU ETS) and UK Emissions Trading Scheme (UK ETS)
EU Renewable Energy Directive II
United Kingdom Renewable Transport Fuel Obligation
Federal Clean Air Act regulations on GHG emissions
EPA regulations on nitrogen oxide emissions and RECLAIM program replacement
Increased regulation of hydraulic fracturing could reduce crude oil and natural gas production
CERCLA and RCRA environmental remediation requirements
Federal Oil Pollution Act of 1990 liability for oil spills
EU REACH and UK REACH chemical regulations
Inflation Reduction Act of 2022 - 15% corporate alternative minimum tax
Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC) sanctions restricting business with certain countries
Potential new regulations on per- and poly-fluoroalkyl substances (PFAS)
Vermont Climate Superfund Act seeking financial damages from fossil fuel companies
Increased regulation of plastic waste and single-use plastics
Changes to government policies relating to renewable feedstocks and renewable fuels affecting tax credits and incentives

sanction_risks: OFAC sanctions limiting ability to do business with entities affiliated with sanctioned countries
Sanctions limiting ability to obtain optimum crude slates and feedstocks
Potential sanctions affecting distribution of refined products
Impact of war in Eastern Europe on operations and commodity prices
Ongoing global impact of conflicts in the Middle East affecting operations
